response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack and open-source experience (notably GISCollective, DLang, Linux work), but the resume shows no track record of leading or mentoring a team, no IT-architecture or project-management leadership role, and only basic German against a hard C1 requirement. Python and UML are also absent from the listed skills. Profile reads as a craftsman-level engineer rather than a Head of Development.
strengths: Long open-source track record incl. founding GISCollective on Linux/Kubernetes
Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded and microservices
Public speaking, workshops and teaching demonstrate communication ability
concerns: German only Basic — fails the C1 hard requirement
No prior formal leadership of a dev/consulting team or Head/Tech Lead title
Python and UML not listed; architecture/PM background is implicit, not demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Open-source, Linux and broad engineering depth
